commands.review_summary:
The PR removes speech-core from always-allowed bundled runtime facade staging, adds installed-package verification for allowed runtime facade sidecars, and updates QA, facade, and release verifier tests.

PR surface: Source -2, Tests +192, Other +177. Total +367 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level. Current main and v2026.6.9 still allow `speech-core/runtime-api.js` as a bundled runtime facade while no `extensions/speech-core` sidecar exists; I did not run a fresh installed Gateway repro.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Maintainers need to review the contract and the branch needs refresh; automation should not choose between sidecar compatibility and package-backed behavior.
